description_long: This object is a round, green cabbage with tightly packed leaves forming a dense head. The outer leaves are darker and slightly open, curling away from the main body and revealing lighter green, veined inner leaves. The surface of the cabbage displays a natural matte finish with visible vein patterns running across each leaf. The head is moderately compact, with some outer leaves appearing looser and more separated from the core. The overall coloration transitions from deep green on the outermost leaves to a lighter, more vibrant green toward the center. The cabbage appears fresh and robust, suitable for placement in an urban market, garden, or roadside vegetable stand.
description: A round, green cabbage with tightly packed, veined leaves and some loose outer leaves curling away from the head. The surface is matte and transitions from dark to lighter green.
description_view_0: This view shows the cabbage with several outer leaves curling outward, revealing the round, compact head and prominent leaf veins.
description_view_1: The cabbage appears more symmetrical from this angle, with the outer leaves partially enclosing the head and the leaf veins clearly visible.
description_view_2: This side highlights the curvature of the outer leaves and the smooth, rounded surface of the cabbage head, with fewer leaves curling outward.
description_view_3: The back view displays the cabbage's rounded form and the overlapping pattern of the leaves, with the outermost leaves more tightly hugging the head.
